case_title: MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. VS MOBIUS TECHNOLOGIES

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOBIUS TECHNOLOGIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $508.65 FILED BY MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MOBIUS TECHNOLOGIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICRO COMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOBIUS TECHNOLOGIES $508.65 PRINCIPAL, $64.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $572.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
